title: The Horse And The Ass
content:
Overladen the Ass was. The Horse
    Wouldn't help; but had time for remorse
    When the Ass lay dead there;
    For he then had to bear
    Both the load of the Ass & his corse.

    Grudge Not Help!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "The Horse And The Ass", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
